mapper.select: SELECT * FROM v_region_freight_volume ORDER BY total_quantity DESC

SELECT wh.name AS warehouse_name, g.name AS goods_name, inv.quantity, inv.safety_stock FROM inventory inv JOIN warehouse wh ON wh.whid = inv.whid JOIN goods g ON g.goodsid = inv.goodsid WHERE inv.quantity <= inv.safety_stock ORDER BY inv.quantity
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count_value FROM waybill GROUP BY status ORDER BY FIELD(status, '待发运', '运输中', '已签收', '已取消')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_date, '%Y-%m') AS month_value, COUNT(*) AS waybill_count, COALESCE(SUM(total_freight), 0) AS freight_amount FROM waybill GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month_value
